Window Cleaning.name: Window Cleaning
Window Cleaning.description: Help Anna clean the livingroom window to get Love points
Window Cleaning.unlock: Unlocked automatically after entering the livingroom.
tips: Left click and drag to clean
Start at the top of the first window and shake your mouse through the dirty segments

squirt_racing.name: Squirt Racing
squirt_racing.description: High-stakes street racing where speed isn't the only thing that matters.
squirt_racing.unlock: Pay off your first $5,000 of debt and talk to Toni at the Garage.
tips: Shift at the green line for a perfect start.
Save your nitro for the final straightaway.
Upgrade your tires before challenging Jack.

poker_night.name: Poker Night
poker_night.description: Test your luck and your bluffing skills against the regulars at the Bar.
poker_night.unlock: Unlocked automatically after meeting Mario on Tuesday night.
tips: Watch Mario's eyes; he bluffs when he looks left.
Don't go all-in unless you have at least a Pair of Kings.
Losing to Sofia triggers a unique dialogue path.
